parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, submissionId: $('Update Submission Status').first().json.submission_id || $json.submissionId, status: $json.status, adaptations: $json.adaptations || $json.results, message: $json.message }) }}

parameters.content:
## 📋 SELECTION VALIDATION
Validate draft selection, fetch submission, check state and expiry, lock for processing

## ✏️ PLATFORM ADAPTATION — LinkedIn, X, Newsletter
AI-powered content adaptation with platform-specific formatting rules and validation

## 📤 PUBLISHING — With idempotency keys
Conditional publishing to LinkedIn, X/Twitter, and email newsletter with retry and dedup

## 💾 STATE UPDATE
Update submission status in Supabase and return final result to frontend
